violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Several cloths throughout the kitchen were left out on prep tables abd not stored properly.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of. Vacuum sealer and product is vacuum sealed in the walk-in cooler. They do not have a HACCP plan.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The microwave on the expo line needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors and walls throughout the facility need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Missing several ceiling tiles throughout the facility.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Kitchen microwave found with old food buildup.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
